Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Nethergate]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Unsouled ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 8''' — A stone tablet fragment was supposedly found at the base of the Nethergate.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 12''' — The Nethergate opens every ten years, allowing Fallen Leaf elders to retrieve treasures from the labyrinth's shallowest levels.}}

== Bloodline ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 21''' — The Nethergate is a gate that opens with a hissing release of power.}}

== Reaper ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 21''' — The Nethergate is the exit to the labyrinth.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 21''' — The Nethergate is a location that can crack or swing open.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 24''' — The Nethergate is a gate that Yerin and Eithan approached.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 24''' — Reigan Shen exited through the Nethergate.}}

== Dreadgod ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 2''' — The Nethergate is a giant stone door carved with the image of the Slumbering Wraith.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 21''' — Lindon and Cassias watched an exodus from the Nethergate.}}

== Waybound ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 12''' — Lindon flew toward the Nethergate in Sacred Valley.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 15''' — Lindon passed through the Nethergate.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
